Interface JpqlQueryBuilder.WhereStep

Enclosing class:
JpqlQueryBuilder
public static interface JpqlQueryBuilder.WhereStep
Fluent interface to build a JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate.
Since:
4.0
Author:
Mark Paluch, Choi Wang Gyu, Jeongwon Ryu

    Create a LIKE … ESCAPE predicate.

    Create a less < … predicate.
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate

    Create a less-or-equals <= … predicate.
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate

    Create a MEMBER OF &lt;collection&gt; predicate.
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate
    neq(JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression value)
    Create a &lt;&gt; (not equals) predicate.
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate
    notIn(JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression value)
    Create a NOT IN predicate.
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate
    notLike(JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression value, String escape)
    Create a NOT LIKE … ESCAPE predicate.
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate
    notMemberOf(JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression value)
    Create a NOT MEMBER OF &lt;collection&gt; predicate.
